name: @umbraculum/i18n-keys
description: Umbraculum i18n-keys SDK — namespace conventions and key helpers for module-owned message keys (module message roots, nav label keys, reserved platform roots). Platform-classified per sub-plan #9 §1.1; published as a peer of @umbraculum/module-sdk per PLATFORM-ARCHITECTURE.md §4.4. Greenfield package landed 2026-05-27 (not a carve-out from @umbraculum/i18n).
